CE1.justification: Agent loaded its own context from AGENTS.md files and acted directly, never asking the user to recall, restate, or look anything up.

CE2.justification: Per-item OK/MISSING breakdown is load-bearing runbook output, but the opening restatement of what was run and the three-step 'cheapest path to Go' recovery section add one stretch of unneeded prose.

CE3.justification: Stated where the checklist went (tmp/release-readiness/2.4/checklist.md) and why (per runbook output spec, release id derived from 'v2.4'), in-band and brief.

CE4.justification: A single clean create with no orphan artifacts and a coherent No-go decision written in place; interrupting would leave no triage.
